'''Mecetti Province''' was a section of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] ruled by [[House Mecetti]]. The [[Procopian Shipping Lane]] and the [[Leozi Route]] ran through a large portion of the province. Mecetti Province was bordered by [[Melantha Province]], [[Calipsa Province]], and [[Reena Province]].<ref name="LotE" />

{{Sec-stub}}
